```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.9em;align-items:stretch;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1.3em 0.95em 1.4em;text-align:center;border:1px solid #F0DDB4;border-top:4px solid #C4881A;box-shadow:0 14px 32px rgba(196,136,26,0.2),0 2px 6px rgba(44,62,80,0.07);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.75em;">
   <div style="width:2.7em;height:2.7em;border-radius:0.6em;background:#FEF5E7;border:1px solid #F0DDB4;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#C4881A;"><i data-lucide="bot" style="width:1.35em;height:1.35em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;line-height:1.3;">You used an agent.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1.3em 0.95em 1.4em;text-align:center;border:1px solid #A6C4EA;border-top:4px solid #3A7DC9;box-shadow:0 14px 32px rgba(58,125,201,0.2),0 2px 6px rgba(44,62,80,0.07);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.75em;">
   <div style="width:2.7em;height:2.7em;border-radius:0.6em;background:#DCE9FA;border:1px solid #A6C4EA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#3A7DC9;"><i data-lucide="globe" style="width:1.35em;height:1.35em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#3A7DC9;line-height:1.3;">You built a website project.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1.3em 0.95em 1.4em;text-align:center;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;border-top:4px solid #5654A2;box-shadow:0 14px 32px rgba(86,84,162,0.2),0 2px 6px rgba(44,62,80,0.07);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.75em;">
   <div style="width:2.7em;height:2.7em;border-radius:0.6em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;"><i data-lucide="package" style="width:1.35em;height:1.35em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;line-height:1.3;">You turned it into a skill.</div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
